title: OpenAI Codex CLI Added Admin Config, Controller RPCs, Hosted Tools, And Multi-Agent Updates
summary: OpenAI's Codex CLI 0.137 changelog records expanded terminal controls, monthly credit-limit and cloud-managed config support for enterprise/admin flows, app-server v2 controller grant RPCs, plugin JSON/catalog improvements, hosted web and image tools in more code-mode flows, multi-agent v2 runtime metadata, and multiple reliability fixes.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Codex changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Review Codex enterprise/admin controls for monthly credit limits, cloud-managed config bundles, and controller grant lifecycle before enabling managed workspaces.
Retest hosted web/image tools, plugin list JSON, cached catalog suggestions, multi-agent runtime metadata, and controller RPC clients against Codex CLI 0.137 or newer.

detail.change_summary: Codex CLI 0.137 changed workflow behavior around admin controls, cloud-managed configs, app-server v2 controller RPCs, plugin machine-readable output, hosted tools, and multi-agent metadata.

limitations: The plugin catalog cache mentioned in the changelog is software-cache behavior; APW does not classify it as prompt caching or token accounting.
APW records public changelog metadata only; workspace entitlement and managed-config availability can vary.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.
